summary: R881632298 Bug Fixes Verified - All 3 reported bugs are fixed: 1) 7 reservations now appear on calendar in 'Atanmamis' rows, 2) Name change synced (murat sutay), 3) R881632298-1 correctly shows cancelled status
features_tested: Backend: R881632298 bookings have correct status (R881632298 confirmed, R881632298-1 cancelled, R881632298-2 to R881632298-6 confirmed) - PASSED
Backend: All bookings have room_type_id field set correctly (Suite, Standard, Deluxe) - PASSED
Backend: Guest name is 'murat sutay' for all R881632298 bookings (name change synced) - PASSED
Backend: /api/pms/bookings endpoint returns room_type_id field for OTA bookings - PASSED
Frontend: Login with demo@hotel.com / demo123 - PASSED
Frontend: Calendar page at /app/reservation-calendar loads correctly - PASSED
Frontend: 4 'Atanmamis' (unassigned) rows visible for each room type - PASSED
Frontend: 19 'murat sutay' booking elements found on calendar - PASSED
Frontend: Suite, Standard, Deluxe sections all display correctly - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: explode_multi_room_reservation correctly detects per-room cancellation state via _room_cancelled flag
Phase B pull logic uses per-room effective_state instead of top-level state
getUnassignedBookingsForType in calendarHelpers.jsx correctly checks both room_type and room_type_id
_sync_reservation_update properly syncs guest name changes and creates notifications
All R881632298 bookings have correct room_type_id mapping (Suite, Standard, Deluxe)
seed_data_creation: None - R881632298 bookings already exist in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: R881632298 multi-room reservation bug fixes verified. All 7 sub-reservations (R881632298, R881632298-1 through R881632298-6) are in the database with correct status (R881632298-1 cancelled, rest confirmed). Guest name 'murat sutay' synced correctly. Calendar shows unassigned bookings in 'Atanmamis' rows for each room type. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_r881632298_bug_fixes.py covers all verification scenarios.

original_bugs: 7 reservations from HotelRunner appeared in notifications but not on calendar
Name change (cengizhan sutay → Murat Sutay) didn't sync
1 room cancellation (R881632298-1) didn't reflect in the system
root_causes: Calendar getUnassignedBookingsForType was only checking room_type, not room_type_id (OTA imports use provider room names)
Phase B pull logic was using top-level state instead of per-room effective_state
explode_multi_room_reservation wasn't detecting per-room cancellation markers
fixes_applied: getUnassignedBookingsForType now checks both room_type and room_type_id
Phase B uses _room_cancelled flag and per-room effective_state
explode_multi_room_reservation sets _room_cancelled flag based on room-level state/status/cancel_reason
_sync_reservation_update syncs guest name changes and creates notifications
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All 6 pytest tests passed. Frontend shows 19 'murat sutay' elements and 4 'Atanmamis' rows. R881632298-1 correctly shows cancelled status.
